_comment: REFERENCE ONLY - MCP config is generated agentically per-project in ~/.prjct-cli/projects/{id}/config/mcp-servers.json

context7.name: context7
useWhen: Agents need to look up API documentation
Working with React, Vue, Next.js, Express, Prisma, etc.
tools: resolve-library-id: Find library ID from name
query-docs: Fetch documentation for a library

agentMcpGuidelines.frontend: Usually needs context7 for component library docs
agentMcpGuidelines.backend: Usually needs context7 for framework docs
agentMcpGuidelines.database: Usually needs context7 for ORM docs
agentMcpGuidelines.uxui: Usually needs context7 for UI library docs
agentMcpGuidelines.testing: May need context7 for testing library docs
agentMcpGuidelines.devops: Rarely needs MCP, uses bash commands
agentMcpGuidelines.prjct-planner: May need context7 for framework planning

discoveryInstructions: When generating MCP config, analyze the project's package.json/dependencies to determine which MCP servers would be useful. Don't blindly apply all servers - only add what the project actually needs.
